title: Formula 1 Is Wall Street's New Money Machine—With Horsepower
author: Piero Cingari
description: Goldman Sachs initiated coverage on Liberty Media's Formula 1 with a Buy rating, projecting 17% upside potential. The analysis highlights F1's strong revenue growth, MotoGP expansion, and significant capital return opportunities through strategic media and sponsorship developments.

title: Rosenblatt Maintains Buy Rating for Liberty Formula One Group: Here's What You Need To Know
author: Benzinga Insights
description:
Rosenblatt has decided to maintain its Buy rating of Liberty Formula One Group (NASDAQ:FWONK) and raise its price target from $81.00 to $82.00.
Shares of Liberty Formula One Group are trading down 0.82% over the last 24 hours, at $66.30 per share.
A move to $82.00 would account for a 23.68% increase from the current share price.
About Liberty Formula One Group
Formula One Group controls the exclusive commercial and promotional rights to the FIA Formula One World Championship series, and the monetization of those rights is the primary business of the group.
